instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable launch control when vehicle starts from standstill.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate launch control when Vehicle_Speed equals zero and throttle input exceeds threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed = 0 AND Throttle_Position > Launch_Throttle_Threshold THEN Activate_Launch_Control

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall regulate clutch engagement during vehicle launch.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall gradually increase clutch pressure during launch phase.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent launch when brake pedal is applied.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable launch control when Brake_Pedal equals pressed.

L4_requirements: IF Brake_Pedal = Released AND Vehicle_Speed = 0 THEN Allow_Launch_Control
IF Launch_Request = TRUE AND Brake_Pedal = Pressed THEN Reject_Launch_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall limit engine torque during launch.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall restrict engine torque when launch control is active.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent wheel slip during launch.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall monitor wheel speed difference during launch.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect launch phase completion.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall exit launch control when vehicle speed exceeds launch speed limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect launch control faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when launch control parameters exceed limits.

L4_requirements: IF Launch_Parameter > Launch_Parameter_Limit THEN Launch_Control_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall verify driver launch request.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate launch control only when driver throttle request exceeds threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Launch_Throttle_Threshold THEN Launch_Request = TRUE
IF Launch_Request = TRUE AND Vehicle_Speed = 0 THEN Activate_Launch_Control

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe operation during launch control.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate protection mode when abnormal launch condition occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall log launch control events.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall record diagnostic data during launch control operation.
